## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Natalie Al Saad for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong AI & Process Experience:** Natalie grew organic traffic 86% using ChatGPT and solved a severe bottleneck by introducing a shared calendar and syncs, a system still in use.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Role Requires Prompt Engineering:** The job is editing *and* prompt engineering. Editors operate GrowthX's internal tool, Atlas, to build and refine content pipelines, not just use a black-box LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Critical Example:** GrowthX built a pipeline to enforce a client's trademarked ingredient (Afron™ Saffron), solving a complex legal/medical accuracy problem that would be unscalable with manual editing.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Natalie's background aligns with the role; Marilia will schedule interviews with other GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Topics

### The Role: Managing Editor at GrowthX

  - [**Focus:** Process-oriented role combining content editing with prompt engineering for GrowthX's internal tool, Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**Daily Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Editing content for client delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Operating content pipelines via Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Iterative improvement: Identifying pipeline flaws and filing tickets for dev cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [**Core Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Context Engineering:** Providing LLMs with authoritative sources (e.g., client docs) to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [**Prompt Engineering:** Translating client needs into precise, actionable instructions for the LLM.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Observability:** Using Atlas to trace the LLM's decision-making process to diagnose issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

### Candidate Experience: Natalie Al Saad

  - [**Background:** 9+ years in SEO-driven content, primarily in the GCC (KSA, UAE, Qatar).](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Current Role (Fathom):** Manages the blog; uses AI for workflow and content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**AI-Driven Results:** Grew organic traffic 86% by year-end using ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [**Process Improvement Example (SEO Agency):**](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Problem:** Siloed teams (writers vs. SEO) and unmanageable volume (50k words/day) caused chaos.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implemented a shared content calendar and weekly syncs to align teams.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Resolved the bottleneck in 10 days; the system is still in use.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Alignment: AI & Content Philosophy

  - [**Natalie's AI Workflow (ChatGPT):**](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Process:** Defines objective → provides detailed prompts (tone, SEO, brand guidelines) → manually fact-checks outputs for inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**Key Learning:** Requires highly specific instructions; generic prompts fail.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**GrowthX's AI Philosophy (Atlas):**](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build scalable, accurate pipelines that handle complex rules automatically, freeing editors for higher-level work.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [**Example:** A client required using the trademarked ingredient "Afron™ Saffron" only when mentioning their product, but generic "saffron" otherwise.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [**Solution:** A new pipeline was engineered to enforce this rule, solving a problem that would be unscalable with manual editing.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

### Logistics & Client Base

  - [**Client Base:** Mostly US-based, driven by inbound leads.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Localization:** Growing need for localization (e.g., English/Spanish for a travel client). Natalie's Arabic/English translation background is a strong asset.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marilia:** Schedule Natalie for interviews with other GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/Tcm64JuV3NKJsghCzRwM_hzzTYiXR5yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
